reviews.review_title: PLS add more rides like rollercoasters
reviews.review_description: I love rollercoasters and indoor rides that move on a rollercoaster cart but No offense but in my opinion everything is bad except for the Brass band hero, The rollercoaster (I forgot the name) and the Spooky castle. So what I’m saying is that I want rides that are like indoor rides like roller coasters.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest opinion! We wanted to recreate some of the rides of the original Oktoberfest, so some are less exciting as the roller coasters. But we hear you! Hopefully we can bring new rides to you soon! Happy you like Brass Band also!  🎺

reviews.review_description:
I love this game. Bc i always loveee amusement park 😄
And also really having fun making conversation with new ppl, we can also sharing gift, playing ride together, buttt…. I have veryyyyy low tolerance with motion sickness 😭
I wonder how ppl can walk on VR with no problem for hours😭
Bc i can only handle for at least 10minutes, while closing my eyes every time i make a step 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your kind words! Regarding the motion sickness, you can also teleport and activate a vignette that should reduce the effect. But of course not on TopSpin haha! 🌀

reviews.review_description: Nothing to do, most attractions require a certain level in order to use them. There's only 2 activities you can do to level up and they don't provide enough xp to level. You would only have fun if you play with friends which I don't have. There's a bunch of winey kids arguing about everything. Also the pet system is kinda annoying. Besides, pets aren't really allowed in amusement parks without acceptions and they can't ride tides or do activities. So pets don't make sense.

reviews.review_title: OVER ALL GAME WAS  JUST STRAIGHT CRAP
reviews.review_description: You load in to get a tutorial and 3-7ear olds screaming about relationships! Not only that but you have to unlock so many rides. I hate this game!
I have this game from March and i unlock so many Rides!I play this game with my friends it’s so fun

developer_response.body: Thank you so much!! It means a lot to us to know you like our game 🥰

reviews.review_description: Just there are kids saying thd hard N

developer_response.body: Thank you! We'll try to moderate them more! ⚠️

reviews.review_description: The best game ever

developer_response.body: Thank you!! 💛

reviews.review_title: I hate this game (not too much)
reviews.review_description:
THESE FREAKING 3—7 YEAR OLDS ARE TALKING TRASH AND HAVE VC then the in barrel hunt you can rejoin to be a FREAKING RUNNER then THERE NEEDS TO BE A MORE obvious WAY FOR REPORTING and i want a thing in the menu where you can mute the whole server

Sincerly:Alan

developer_response.body: Hi Alan, we're very sad that you hate the game 😢 we don't have a reporting feature, but please join our discord to report which users are bothering in game. Thank you so much for your help. Oh and you can mute the server by reducing the voice volume in the audio settings.

reviews.review_description: this game has not been letting me join it keeps saying Check your internet  my internet is at full bars i have been trying to get in for 6 days and i rebooted my Oculus and it says the same thing and your mods keep banning people for no reason Including me  but other than that your game is five stars.

developer_response.body: If our automatic moderation system detects too many ToS violations (most likely use of racist language) your account will get banned. You can always join our discord to appeal  this decision so we can give you access again. https://discord.gg/bFVrUEM9Cq

developer_response.body: Thank you!! 😍🥰 please share your runs on Youtube!

reviews.review_description: I like it

I used go in it, but other people started bullying me so I haven’t gone in it for months. I just saw another review from someone else who got bullied. How on earth are we supposed to know when to record the bullying? Meta claims it’s a safe place. In my opinion words hurt worse than just being bullied. Meta put a bubble around our avatars years ago . I’m so sick of that bubble. Being bullied is worse

developer_response.body: We're sorry you had a bad experience. Did you try the new blocking feature? It will hide and mute the blocked player and they won't be able to see you either.  Hopefully you can make use of it to enjoy Oktoberfest again 💛

reviews.review_description: I love the game and stuff but the thing i hate about barrel hunt is the toddler s that. Run around and cheat and also i hate the rejoners they make the game not fun its still fun and also i do think that it is nice that this game is a real place!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback and nice words 💛 We'll fix the rejoiners problem soon.

reviews.review_title: So GOOD! just one problem of price stuff
reviews.review_description: This game is wonderful indeed! but if you could make it where you can buy smaller pack outfits like traditional clothing only with clothes that would help alot of new players and existing players.

This game is close to what I've always wanted in a VR carnival game. Rides, games, food, real people. I just wish that the rides and smooth locomotion were smooth. I'm on Quest 3 and it's a bit jerky. Also, the barrel game was a disappointment not only because I can't physically play it, but because it's not a realistic carnival attraction. More traditional attractions would be appreciated.

developer_response.body: Thank you! As it is our intention to make Oktoberfest the best VR carnival we're always working on improving performance and also adding new features. Your feedback is a good reminder to be more inclusive with the next attractions again 👍

reviews.review_description: To many Children running around saying the n word it’s a great game but not very welcoming or inclusive for people of color   These kids  think it’s just them  or everybody else is an npc give please get moderators  and parents please watch what your kids say and do online

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry you had a bad experience in the game! Please help us banning players with abusive behavior by sending us a recording in our discord channel https://discord.com/invite/7HPraHzTtY or via email to report@oktoberfest.game
Thank you very much! 🙏

reviews.review_description: I know its free so no harm no foul, but you lose out on the time wasted downloading it. So dont bother.

developer_response.body: We're sorry, you couldn't connect, but the servers are up and running. It could have been a problem on your side. We kindly ask you to change the one star review.

reviews.review_description: This it’s like a biggest vr theme park ever.

developer_response.body: Thank you!! That's what we set out to create 💫

reviews.review_description: I love this game. I spend a lot of time helping new people get started in the right direction. It is rewarding to help kids who are not sure where to start. Two new attractions just opened and more to come.  Please report abuse if you see it because there are a lot of very young kids on here and we all need to work together to keep a safe environment for them! I'm looking forward to what the future holds for this game!

The fun part was the pets 
￼

So far I made all the money I could ever need on a ball toss game. There are a couple of rides and the rest are blocked off and all have signs that say you need to join their discord or check back in the future or that it’s not available right now. The most you can do is spend your money on the millions of food stands which is pretty lackluster. The rides that are available have great physics. There’s one area I’m trying to unlock, but it says you have to master barrel hunt but when you get to barrel Hunt, there’s no instructions on what to do and it’s just kids screaming vulgarities. It also talks about an easy reporting process, but I can’t find anywhere to report a player. Seems like a bunch of stuff to just look at not really do.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your thorough review! This is really helpful to us 🙏  We're working hard on opening the remaining attractions and will include a moderation feature with the next update that will mute profanities automatically and allows us to track bad behavior much better. It will also allow players to block others completely, so they are not audible and visible anymore.

reviews.review_title: A very fun place to hangout!
reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying Octoberfest! The games and rides that are currently open are lots of fun! As someone who has attended Octoberfest, the feel is very much like the real thing. It is currently in "Early Access" so unfortunately not all of the attractions are open yet. I am hoping the game will be finished soon i can enjoy the full experience. Keep up the great work guys!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! 🎉 We’re glad you’re enjoying the rides and games, and it’s awesome to hear it feels like the real Oktoberfest🙌

reviews.review_description: This game is nice i really like it! a lot of rude little kids but i can defend myself for now, so many cool people also!

developer_response.body: Thank you, we're happy you also found cool people and enjoy the game! 💛 Please don't hesitate to join our discord if you want to report someone who's too rude. This way we can take action.

reviews.review_description:
Great game.  It’s just like being at a real Theme Park.  I totally enjoyed the Shooting Range, riding all the Rides, the Music is atmospheric and great.  Love interacting with all the players by either microphone to have a conversation, or just with expressions using my hands.

Developers… keep up the great work, also love your new ride update… The Rotor 👍👍👍❤️❤️❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing feedback! 🎉

reviews.review_title: Very fun and lots to do! Potential!
reviews.review_description:
Great game. Thanks for making it free and what you’ve added into the game so far. I haven’t unlocked everything yet but everything I have played, it’s been fun. 

Can you please help me with an issue I’m having? When I go into “Social/Friends” then click on my online friend’s name, expecting to see their profile.. the game glitches and it shows my profile? There’s no way to invite, join or do anything to get with the friend. I know this may be just an early access issue, maybe I’m doing something wrong. I have great wifi, quest 3S, have updated software, etc. shouldn’t be on my end. Thanks!

developer_response.body: Hi, happy you like our game. The problem you are having with you own profile showing up is unfortunately a know issue, it's very hard to find the exact reason why this is happening as it is connected to some network caching, it's definitely not on your end. Sometimes it helps to close the app and restart it.

So I downloaded the game a couple days ago and I love it i been playing for a while now and I met a lot of people who are really nice and there are cool stuff but it might not be made for some people so to figure it out if’s it made for you find out and have fun bye

developer_response.body: So glad you’re having such a great time! 🎉

reviews.review_description: Awesome game recommend to everyone!

developer_response.body: 💛 that means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: I have to say this game is literally amazing. Well built and creative. The many stands/games make this game not boring and being able to ride different rides with friends makes this even more better. Walking around never gets boring nor does spending in game money on the stands. Especially for virtual food lol. I’ve enjoyed this game mainly because of how good the mechanics and visuals are. It’s very smooth gaming experience and I’m always feeling like I’m in a real sort of theme park or something. Obviously not realistic looking but it’s so immersive you feel like you’re actually having a great time with friends. I’d literally rate this game a 10/10. Can’t wait for future updates as well as more rides to come.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words! 🎉 We’re glad you’re enjoying the rides, games, and vibe & we can’t wait to bring even more fun in future updates 🙌

reviews.review_description: The rides are fun but definitely can cause motion sickness even if you aren’t prone to it. I just closed my eyes if I got too disoriented. Lots of exposure to some inappropriate language from other folks playing the game but you can turn the sound off.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts! 🎢 We’re glad you enjoyed the rides, and we know motion sickness can sometimes happen in VR. We also take community safety seriously, so if you encounter inappropriate behavior, please join our Discord where you can report it directly, and we’ll look into it 🙌 bit.ly/OktoberfestVRDiscord

reviews.review_description: 4.5 stars out of 5. I’ve been enjoying this game so far, and I love the addition of the pets. It’s great having a pet follow me around, but great job devs in providing a way to drop it off if you need time alone. I have no problem with younger players, but hearing a bunch of kids swearing, name calling, and being generally obnoxious detracts from the experience, but I can ignore them pretty easily. It would be nice to have an adults only day from time to time to escape the kiddos. There are some rides that look like they would be fun, so I’m a little disappointed that they aren’t open yet which is why I didn’t give this game five stars. Looking forward to seeing how this continues to evolve!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the thoughtful review! We're glad you're enjoying the pets and the vibe 🐾 We'll pass your feedback on rides and community experience to the team — and we really appreciate the support as we continue to grow! 🎡
